## TwoWayBindable type

A value that can either be a constant, a regular store, or a store marked for two-way binding.

**Signature:**

```typescript
type TwoWayBindable<T> = Bindable<T> | TwoWayBinding<T>;
```
**References:** [Bindable](./openrct2-flexui.bindable.md)<!-- -->, [TwoWayBinding](./openrct2-flexui.twowaybinding.md)
